home.title: TraviXO - Your Fleet Is Tracked. But Not Connected.
home.description: Link each machine to its QR code, VGP compliance, documents, and history. Replace tracking scattered across your systems. Operational in hours.

about.title: About TraviXO - Built from Real Rental Operations
about.description: See how TraviXO replaces fragmented tracking with a clear system: machine, QR, compliance, documents, history.

contact.title: Contact TraviXO - Start Your Free Pilot
contact.description: Talk to us about your fleet. See how to connect your machines to their compliance and documents in one place.

features.title: Features - TraviXO Equipment Tracking
features.description: Import your fleet, generate QR codes, track equipment in the field, and manage VGP compliance without patching between systems.

pricing.title: Pricing - TraviXO Equipment Tracking
pricing.description: Simple, readable pricing for equipment tracking with VGP. Plans from €490/month.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - TraviXO
privacy.description: TraviXO privacy policy and data protection information.

terms.title: Terms of Service - TraviXO

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice - TraviXO
legalNotice.description: TraviXO legal notices and company information as required by French law.

hero.title: Your fleet lives in 3 places. It should be one.
hero.subtitle: It's tracked, but not connected. TraviXO links each machine to its QR code, its VGP compliance, its documents, and its history, in one chain, from depot to site.
hero.ctaPrimary: Try It on Your Real Fleet

1.title: Upload Your File in 5 Minutes
1.text: No need to clean up your export first. Inconsistent columns, blank cells, rough headers. We handle it. You upload, it starts.

2.title: Print 500 QR Codes in 30 Seconds
2.text: The print-ready PDF is generated immediately. Stick the codes on your equipment and you're live.

3.title: Start Tracking Your Fleet the Same Day
3.text: Where other setups take weeks, TraviXO typically lets you start tracking the same day.

problem.title: Your equipment is tracked. But across your systems, your folders, and your emails, nothing connects.
problem.subtitle: That's where losses, errors, and compliance risks come from.

1.title: Equipment gets lost between systems
1.text: Machines move between depots, sites, and clients. The trace is in one system, the contract in another, the last known status nowhere.

2.title: Audits stay manual and incomplete
2.text: Field counts, cross-referencing between files, gaps found too late. The process repeats every quarter.

3.title: VGP compliance is not under control
3.text: Certificates are in one place. Dates in another. Reminders are manual. Miss one inspection and you're exposed.

4.title: No single source of truth
4.text: Billing is in one system. Equipment tracking in another. Certificates in folders. Nothing is connected.

solution.title: One system linking equipment to compliance
solution.subtitle: Each machine becomes traceable, documented, and audit-ready

1.title: File import
1.text: You upload your file as it exists today. Columns are detected automatically. 500 assets can be imported in 5 minutes.

2.title: One QR code per machine
2.text: Each piece of equipment gets a physical entry point. One scan gives access to its full record.

3.title: Scan with any phone
3.text: No app to install. Any smartphone is enough to see the location, condition, status, and history.

4.title: Compliance and documents linked to the machine
4.text: VGP dates, certificates, and history are tied to the machine. Always available during inspection.

scanOut.title: Checkout to client
scanOut.body: When equipment leaves the depot, a scan creates a timestamped event: who took it out, when, with what notes. No paperwork to dig up. The proof is already recorded.

scanReturn.title: Return with recorded condition
scanReturn.body: On return, a second scan records the equipment condition, with notes and photos if needed. If there's a dispute about damage or a date, the history is there.

chain.title: Complete chain of responsibility
chain.body: Every piece of equipment shows its full journey: who had it, for how long, and in what condition it was returned.

recall.title: A VGP is expiring at a client site? You know before they do.
recall.body: TraviXO automatically cross-references your VGP dates with active rentals. If a machine is approaching its deadline while still at a client, you receive an alert early enough to arrange the return and schedule the inspection before the due date.
recall.cta: No non-compliant equipment circulating without your knowledge.

exceptions.title: The gaps you need to see right away

overdueReturn.title: Expected return not scanned
overdueReturn.body: A machine was due back last night and no return has been scanned. TraviXO alerts you the next morning.

missingAudit.title: Equipment missing after inventory
missingAudit.body: The depot inventory is done. Two assets are unaccounted for. TraviXO generates the list as a PDF and sends it to you automatically.

vgpExpiring.title: VGP expiring during an active rental
vgpExpiring.body: A machine whose VGP expires in 10 days is still at a client. The recall alert goes out immediately to arrange the return before the deadline.

useCases.title: Built for how you actually work

btp.title: Construction equipment rental
btp.body: Aerial platforms, forklifts, compressors, generators. Manage VGP across the whole fleet, know which client each machine is assigned to, and get an alert before an inspection expires during a rental.

multiDepot.title: Fleet spread across multiple depots
multiDepot.body: Equipment on 2 or 3 sites, with constant movement. Every scan creates a timestamped trace. An inventory surfaces the missing list as a PDF, sent automatically.

excel.title: Centralise your compliance
excel.body: Your certificates are in one place, your dates in another, your history nowhere. Import your equipment list in 10 minutes. TraviXO connects it all: automatic alerts, centralised certificates, accessible history.

finalCta.title: Stop losing track of your equipment
finalCta.subtitle: Replace tracking scattered across your systems, folders, and emails with one chain that links the machine to its documents.
finalCta.primary: Try It on Your Real Fleet

depotScene.title: A machine needs to leave this morning.
depotScene.trigger: Before it leaves the depot, you must hand the client the last VGP report and the compliance certificate. It's the law.

search.title: You start looking:
search.item1: Last VGP date: in your system, a binder, or from memory
search.item2: The certificate: in a shared folder, an email, or a filing cabinet
search.item3: Confirmation that the report has no outstanding remarks

depotScene.result: By the time you've gathered everything, the machine could already have been on its way.
depotScene.insight: If the documents were linked to the machine, the answer would take 30 seconds. Not half an hour.

erpPositioning.title: TraviXO does not replace your ERP.
erpPositioning.body: It connects what your ERP doesn't: the physical machine, its compliance, its documents, and its field traceability.

credibility.title: Built for real operations
credibility.item1: Designed for fleets of 50 to 2,000 machines
credibility.item3: No dependency on any specific ERP

hero.title: About TraviXO
hero.subtitle: Built from real operational problems in equipment rental

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: TraviXO comes from direct exposure to how equipment is managed in the field. Even structured companies face the same problem: data lives in one system, certificates in another, and field history isn't connected to either.
story.paragraph2: It's not a lack of tools. It's a lack of connection between them. That's why documents get lost, deadlines slip, and inventories never add up.
story.paragraph3: We built TraviXO to connect what was fragmented:

list.item1: Equipment linked to a QR code

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Replace fragmented tracking with a clear system where every machine is identifiable, traceable, and compliant without manual work.

efficiency.title: Time Matters
efficiency.description: Every minute spent wrestling with software is a minute taken from operations. We build for speed and simplicity.

realWorld.title: Built for the Field
realWorld.description: The network drops, data is messy, teams change. TraviXO is built for those conditions, not for a perfect demo.

transparency.title: Total Clarity
transparency.description: Readable pricing, exportable data, no unnecessary lock-in. Your information stays yours.

customerFirst.title: Driven by Real Problems
customerFirst.description: Every feature starts from a real problem experienced by a customer or by us before TraviXO.

founders.title: Our Background

list.item1: An IT support background from demanding equipment environments
list.item2: A payroll management background focused on process reliability and compliance

founders.conclusion: TraviXO is developed in Paris, hosted in Europe, and GDPR compliant. Our goal is simple: help any company managing equipment know what they have, where it is, and who has it.

cta.title: Start tracking properly
cta.description: Replace fragmented tracking with a system built for your operations
cta.button: Try It on Your Real Fleet

hero.title: TraviXO Features
hero.subtitle: From QR tracking to VGP management. The essentials for running a fleet with no blind spots.

import.title: Upload Any File

bulk.title: Bulk QR Generation
bulk.description: 500 print-ready codes in 30 seconds. No clicking through assets one by one.

deploy.title: Fast Setup
deploy.description: Tracking can start within hours of signup. Not 2 to 4 weeks later.

availableNow.title: Available Now
availableNow.subtitle: Ready to use from day one

qrTracking.title: QR Equipment Tracking
qrTracking.description: Generate QR codes for your entire fleet. Each piece of equipment gets a unique code linked to its record.

vgp.title: Automated VGP Tracking
vgp.description: Keep your inspection deadlines under control with automatic tracking. Scheduling, reminders, and reports ready for verification.
items: Email reminders at 30, 15, 7, and 1 day before due, plus overdue

excelImport.title: Import Your Equipment List
excelImport.description: Upload your equipment file and start tracking in 5 minutes. Columns like Serial Number, Location, or Purchase Date are detected automatically, even if your headers are in French, abbreviated, or inconsistent.
items: Works with French and English column headers

mobileScanning.title: Scan with Any Phone
mobileScanning.description: Your teams scan equipment with any smartphone, no app install required. Fast, even in less-than-ideal conditions.
items: Compatible with any smartphone, no install
Last scan recorded: operator, notes, equipment condition

direccte.title: VGP Inspection Reports
direccte.description: Generate your reports in one click. Complete inspection history and exports formatted for DREETS inspections.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Know who has the machine, when it was last seen, and whether it can go back out on rental. Filter by status, depot, category, or custom fields.

emailAlerts.title: Email Alerts
emailAlerts.description: Daily VGP alerts at D-30, D-14, D-7, D-1, and overdue. Recall alert when a machine approaches its deadline during a rental. Inventory notification with missing assets list.
items: Automated reminders at D-30, D-15, D-7, and D-1
Alert when a machine approaches its deadline during an active rental
Inventory notifications with missing assets list

teamManagement.title: Team Management
teamManagement.description: Invite technicians, separate access levels, and trace who scanned what and when.

apiAccess.title: API Access
apiAccess.description: Connect TraviXO to your existing systems. Full documentation and real-time event notifications.

enterprise.title: Custom Development
enterprise.subtitle: Integration and custom development for Enterprise customers
enterprise.note: Includes integration and development service tailored to your needs

customIntegrations.title: Custom Integrations
customIntegrations.description: Connect TraviXO to your existing ERP, maintenance, or CRM systems.
customIntegrations.examples: Examples: SAGE, SAP, Cegid, two-way data sync

whiteLabel.title: White-Label Branding
whiteLabel.description: Rebrand TraviXO with your logo, colours, and custom domain. Fully branded interface.

onPremise.title: On-Premise Deployment
onPremise.description: Host TraviXO on your own infrastructure for complete data control.

finalCta.title: Ready to Get Started?
finalCta.subtitle: Start by taking back control of your VGP today

hero.title: Let's Talk About Your Equipment Tracking
hero.subtitle: Pilot, feature questions, product demo. Tell us where you are and what you're looking for.

vgp.traditional: Manual tracking, risk of compliance gaps
vgp.travixo: Automated reminders, centralised reports, documents available for inspection

questions.question: Why is VGP tracking not included in the Starter plan?
questions.answer: The Starter plan is designed for basic fleet tracking. VGP management requires more advanced features like inspection scheduling, certificate management, and inspection reports. These are available from the Professional plan onwards. For equipment rental companies in France, this is generally the plan to go with.

questions.question: What's the difference between monthly and annual billing?
questions.answer: Annual billing gives you a 15% discount compared to monthly. For example, the Professional plan costs €14,400/year on annual billing, versus €1,412/month on monthly billing (€16,944/year total).

questions.question: Can I change plans at any time?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. Downgrades are possible at the end of your annual period. Contact us to discuss your specific situation.

questions.question: Are extensions compatible with all plans?
questions.answer: The Extra Assets Pack is available on all plans. Other extensions like predictive maintenance, ERP integrations, and priority SLA require the Professional plan or higher.

questions.question: Do you offer a trial period?
questions.answer: Yes. All plans can be tested for 30 days with full access to features. No credit card required to start.

finalCta.title: Ready to secure your compliance?
finalCta.subtitle: Don't wait for the next inspection to discover your gaps. Try TraviXO free for 30 days.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.paragraph1: Deralis Digital ("we," "us," or "our") operates travixosystems.com under the TraviXO brand and provides QR-based equipment tracking software. We are committed to protecting your personal data and respecting your privacy rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable data protection laws.
section1.paragraph2: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use our website and services.

section2.title: 2. Data Controller
section2.intro: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:

subsection1.title: 3.1 Information You Provide
subsection1.intro: We collect information you voluntarily provide when you:
subsection1.item1: Fill out contact forms (name, email, company, phone number, message)
subsection1.item4: Subscribe to our newsletter or updates
subsection1.item5: Communicate with us via email or phone

subsection2.title: 3.2 Automatically Collected Information
subsection2.intro: When you visit our website, we automatically collect:
subsection2.item1: IP address and geographic location (country/city level)
subsection2.item4: Pages visited and time spent on pages

subsection3.title: 3.3 Cookies and Tracking Technologies
subsection3.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience. See our Cookie Policy for details.

section4.title: 4. How We Use Your Information
section4.item2: Respond to your inquiries and support requests
section4.item3: Send you updates, newsletters, and promotional materials (with your consent)
section4.item4: Analyse website usage and optimise performance
section4.item6: Detect and prevent fraud or security issues

section5.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
section5.intro: We process your data based on:
section5.item1: Consent: When you provide explicit consent (e.g., newsletter signup)
section5.item2: Contractual Necessity: To provide Services you requested
section5.item3: Legitimate Interests: To improve our Services, prevent fraud, and ensure security
section5.item4: Legal Obligations: To comply with applicable regulations

section6.title: 6. Data Sharing and Disclosure
section6.paragraph1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your data with:

subsection1.title: 6.1 Service Providers
subsection1.content: We work with third-party providers for hosting, analytics, email delivery, and payment processing. These providers are bound by confidentiality agreements and may only use your data as instructed.

subsection2.title: 6.2 Legal Requirements
subsection2.content: We may disclose your data if required by law, court order, or government request, or to protect our rights, safety, or property.

subsection3.title: 6.3 Business Transfers
subsection3.content: If TraviXO is involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your data may be transferred. We will notify you before your data is transferred and becomes subject to a different Privacy Policy.

section7.title: 7. Data Retention
section7.content: We retain your data only as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy or as required by law. Account data is retained while your account is active. Contact form data is retained for up to 2 years. Analytics data is anonymised and retained indefinitely.

section8.title: 8. Your Rights (GDPR)
section8.intro: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
section8.item1: Access: Request a copy of your personal data
section8.item2: Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
section8.item3: Erasure: Request deletion of your data
section8.item4: Restriction: Limit how we process your data
section8.item5: Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
section8.item6: Object: Object to processing based on legitimate interests
section8.item7: Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent at any time (does not affect prior processing)
section8.item8: Lodge a Complaint: File a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés), the French data protection authority, at www.cnil.fr or by post at CNIL, 3 Place de Fontenoy - TSA 80715, 75334 Paris Cedex 07
section8.footer: To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@travixosystems.com. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
section8.dpo: Data Protection: For any questions regarding data protection, you may contact our designated contact at dpo@travixosystems.com.

section9.title: 9. Data Security
section9.paragraph1: We implement reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your data from unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. These include encryption, secure servers, and access controls.
section9.paragraph2: No method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your data, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

section10.title: 10. International Data Transfers
section10.content: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA). We ensure that such transfers comply with GDPR by using Standard Contractual Clauses or ensuring the recipient country has adequate data protection laws.

section11.title: 11. Children's Privacy
section11.content: Our Services are not intended for individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child, we will delete it promptly.

section12.title: 12. Cookies and Tracking
section12.paragraph1: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyse traffic, and personalise content. Cookies are small text files stored on your device.

types.title: Types of Cookies We Use:
types.essential: Essential Cookies: Required for the website to function
types.analytics: Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how visitors use our site (e.g., Google Analytics)
types.marketing: Marketing Cookies: Track your activity to show relevant ads

section12.footer: In accordance with CNIL guidelines and ePrivacy regulations, we request your explicit consent before placing non-essential cookies. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through the cookie banner on our website or your browser settings. Essential cookies required for site functionality do not require consent. Disabling non-essential cookies will not affect core website functionality.

section13.title: 13. Third-Party Links
section13.content: Our website may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.

section13b.title: 13b. Automated Decision-Making
section13b.content: We do not use automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects or similarly significant effects on you, as defined under Article 22 of the GDPR. If this changes in the future, we will update this Privacy Policy and obtain your explicit consent where required.

section13c.title: 13c. Data Protection Contact
section13c.content: For any questions or concerns regarding our data processing practices, you may contact our designated data protection contact at dpo@travixosystems.com. You may also contact the CNIL directly at www.cnil.fr.

section14.title: 14. Changes to This Privacy Policy
section14.paragraph1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on this page with a new update date or by sending an email notification.
section14.paragraph2: Your continued use of the Services after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

section15.title: 15. Contact Us
section15.intro: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, contact us:

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.paragraph1: Welcome to TraviXO, operated by Deralis Digital ("we," "us," or "our"). By accessing or using our website (travixosystems.com) and services (collectively, the "Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Services.
section1.paragraph2: These Terms apply to all users, including visitors, customers, and anyone who accesses the Services.

section2.title: 2. Eligibility
section2.intro: To use the Services, you must:
section2.item1: Be at least 18 years old or the age of majority in your jurisdiction
section2.item2: Have the legal authority to enter into binding contracts
section2.item3: Not be prohibited from using the Services under applicable law
section2.footer: By using the Services, you represent and warrant that you meet these requirements.

subsection1.title: 3.1 Account Creation
subsection1.content: To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update it as necessary.

subsection2.title: 3.2 Account Security
subsection2.item1: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
subsection2.item2: All activities that occur under your account
subsection2.item3: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorised access or security breach
subsection2.footer: We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to protect your account.

subsection3.title: 3.3 Account Termination
subsection3.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms or engage in fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activity.

subsection1.title: 4.1 Pricing
subsection1.content: Our pricing plans are listed on travixosystems.com/pricing. Prices are subject to change, but we will notify you before any changes affect your subscription.

subsection2.title: 4.2 Billing and Renewal
subsection2.content: Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing period unless you cancel before the renewal date. You will be charged using your payment method on file.

subsection3.title: 4.3 Refunds
subsection3.content: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for first-time subscribers. After 14 days, fees are non-refundable. Refunds for unused portions of annual subscriptions are prorated if you cancel mid-term.

subsection4.title: 4.4 Late Payment
subsection4.content: If payment fails, we will attempt to charge your payment method up to 3 times. If payment is not received within 7 days, your account may be suspended. We may charge a late fee of €25 or 5% of the outstanding balance, whichever is greater.

subsection1.title: 5.1 Your Right to Cancel
subsection1.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time by contacting us or using the cancellation feature in your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period.

subsection2.title: 5.2 Our Right to Terminate
subsection2.intro: We may suspend or terminate your account if you:
subsection2.item2: Fail to pay fees when due
subsection2.item3: Engage in fraudulent or illegal activity
subsection2.item4: Use the Services in a way that harms TraviXO or other users
subsection2.footer: We will provide reasonable notice before termination unless immediate termination is required for legal or security reasons.

subsection3.title: 5.3 Effect of Termination
subsection3.content: Upon termination, your access to the Services will cease. You will have 30 days to export your data before it is permanently deleted. Fees paid are non-refundable except as stated in Section 4.3.

section6.title: 6. Acceptable Use Policy
section6.item1: Use the Services for any illegal purpose
section6.item2: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems
section6.item3: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the Services
section6.item4: Upload malicious code, viruses, or malware
section6.item5: Interfere with or disrupt the Services or servers
section6.item6: Resell or redistribute the Services without authorisation
section6.item7: Use the Services to infringe on intellectual property rights

subsection1.title: 7.1 Our Ownership
subsection1.content: TraviXO retains all rights, title, and interest in the Services, including all software, designs, trademarks, and documentation. These Terms do not grant you any ownership rights.

subsection2.title: 7.2 Your Content
subsection2.paragraph1: You retain ownership of all data you upload to TraviXO ("Customer Data"). You grant us a limited licence to store, process, and display your data solely to provide the Services.
subsection2.paragraph2: You represent that you have the right to upload Customer Data and that it does not violate any laws or third-party rights.

subsection3.title: 7.3 Feedback
subsection3.content: If you provide feedback, suggestions, or ideas about the Services, we may use them without obligation to you.

section8.title: 8. Data Protection and Privacy
section8.paragraph1: Our collection and use of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the Services, you consent to our data practices as described in the Privacy Policy.
section8.paragraph2: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your data, but we cannot guarantee absolute security. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.

section9.title: 9. Service Level and Availability
section9.paragraph1: We strive to provide reliable Services but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. The Services are provided "as is" and "as available." We may perform maintenance that temporarily affects availability, and we will provide advance notice when possible.

sla.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA):
sla.content: Enterprise customers receive a 99.9% uptime SLA as specified in their contract. Other plans do not include an SLA.

section10.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
section10.intro: To the fullest extent permitted by law:
section10.paragraph1: TraviXO and its affiliates, officers, employees, and agents will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, revenue, data, or use, arising from:
section10.item1: Your use of or inability to use the Services
section10.item3: Errors, bugs, or interruptions in the Services
section10.paragraph2: Our total liability to you for any claim arising from these Terms or the Services will not exceed the fees you paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.
section10.paragraph3: Some jurisdictions do not allow exclusion of certain warranties or limitations on liability, so these limitations may not apply to you.

section11.title: 11. Indemnification
section11.intro: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless TraviXO from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including legal fees) arising from:
section11.item3: Your violation of any laws or third-party rights
section11.item4: Customer Data you upload to the Services

subsection1.title: 12.1 Governing Law
subsection1.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of France, without regard to conflict of law principles.

subsection2.title: 12.2 Jurisdiction
subsection2.content: Any disputes arising from these Terms or the Services will be resolved exclusively in the courts of Paris, France. You consent to the jurisdiction of these courts.

subsection3.title: 12.3 Informal Resolution
subsection3.content: Before filing a legal claim, you agree to contact us at contact@travixosystems.com to attempt to resolve the dispute informally.

section13.title: 13. Changes to These Terms
section13.intro: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by:
section13.method1: Posting the updated Terms on this page with a new update date
section13.method2: Sending an email notification (for active customers)
section13.footer: Your continued use of the Services after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. If you do not agree to the changes, you must cancel your subscription.

section14.title: 14. Right of Withdrawal (Droit de Rétractation)
section14.paragraph1: In accordance with Article L221-18 of the French Consumer Code, consumers and, under Article L221-3, certain non-professional entities and micro-enterprises (fewer than 10 employees and annual turnover under €2 million) who subscribe to our Services through distance selling have the right to withdraw from the contract within 14 calendar days from the date of subscription, without providing any reason.
section14.paragraph2: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must notify us by sending a clear statement (e.g., email to contact@travixosystems.com) before the expiration of the withdrawal period. You may use the standard withdrawal form, although it is not mandatory.
section14.paragraph3: If you exercise your right of withdrawal, we will reimburse all payments received from you within 14 days of receiving your withdrawal notice, using the same payment method as your original transaction.
section14.paragraph4: Please note: In accordance with Article L221-28, the right of withdrawal does not apply to contracts for the supply of digital content not provided on a tangible medium if performance has begun with your prior express consent and your acknowledgment that you thereby lose your right of withdrawal. If you expressly consent to the immediate provision of our Services during the withdrawal period, you waive your right of withdrawal.

subsection1.title: 15.1 Warranty of Conformity
subsection1.content: In accordance with Articles L217-3 to L217-20 of the French Consumer Code, you benefit from the legal warranty of conformity for any digital content or digital services provided under these Terms. If a lack of conformity is found within 2 years of delivery, you are entitled to a remedy (repair, replacement, price reduction, or contract termination) at no additional cost.

subsection2.title: 15.2 Warranty Against Hidden Defects
subsection2.content: In accordance with Articles 1641 to 1649 of the French Civil Code, you benefit from the warranty against hidden defects. If a hidden defect renders the Service unfit for its intended use or significantly diminishes that use, you may choose to return the Service and receive a refund, or keep the Service and receive a partial refund.

subsection3.title: 15.3 Applicability
subsection3.content: These legal warranties apply in addition to any commercial warranty or guarantee we may offer. They apply to consumers and, where applicable, to non-professionals as defined by French law.

section16.title: 16. Prices and Taxes
section16.paragraph1: All prices displayed on our website are in Euros (€) and are exclusive of taxes unless otherwise indicated. Applicable VAT and any other taxes will be added at checkout or on invoices in accordance with applicable tax regulations.
section16.paragraph2: For customers within the European Union, VAT will be applied according to the applicable rate in the customer's country of residence, unless a valid intra-community VAT number is provided. French customers are subject to the standard French VAT rate.

section17.title: 17. Consumer Mediation
section17.content: In accordance with Articles L611-1 to L616-3 of the French Consumer Code, in the event of a dispute that has not been resolved by our customer service, consumers and eligible non-professional entities may refer the matter free of charge to a consumer mediator. The contact details of our designated mediator will be provided upon request. You may also use the European Union's Online Dispute Resolution platform.

section18.title: 18. Data Processing Agreement
section18.content: When TraviXO processes personal data on behalf of a customer (acting as a data processor under GDPR Article 28), the terms of our Data Processing Agreement shall apply. The DPA describes our obligations regarding data security, sub-processors, data breach notification, and data subject rights. A copy is available upon request at contact@travixosystems.com.

subsection1.title: 19.1 Entire Agreement
subsection1.content: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and TraviXO regarding the Services.

subsection2.title: 19.2 Severability
subsection2.content: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.

subsection3.title: 19.3 Waiver
subsection3.content: Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be deemed a waiver of that right or provision.

subsection4.title: 19.4 Assignment
subsection4.content: You may not assign these Terms without our prior written consent. We may assign these Terms without restriction.

subsection5.title: 19.5 Force Majeure
subsection5.content: Neither party will be liable for any delay or failure to perform due to causes beyond its reasonable control (e.g., natural disasters, war, pandemics, government actions).

section4.title: 4. Personal Data
section4.content: The collection and processing of personal data on this website is carried out in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act (Loi Informatique et Libertés of January 6, 1978, as amended). For more information, please consult our Privacy Policy. You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, and port your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@travixosystems.com. You may also file a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés) at www.cnil.fr.

section5.title: 5. Cookies
section5.content: This website uses cookies to enhance user experience and analyse traffic. In accordance with CNIL guidelines, we request your consent before placing non-essential cookies. You may manage your cookie preferences at any time through the cookie banner or your browser settings. For more information, see our Privacy Policy.

section6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
section6.content: Deralis Digital endeavours to provide accurate and up-to-date information on this website. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided. Deralis Digital shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damage resulting from access to or use of this website, including any data loss, damage to equipment, or virus transmission.

section7.title: 7. Hyperlinks
section7.content: This website may contain hyperlinks to third-party websites. Deralis Digital has no control over the content of these external sites and accepts no responsibility for them. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by Deralis Digital.

section8.title: 8. Applicable Law
section8.content: These legal notices are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.
